display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（小小维修兔 v1.4 加载修复版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: fixes a plugin initialization failure introduced in 0.33.4 by accidental newline/backspace control characters inside the incomplete-interaction detector. Restores the settings panel and RabbitMirror runtime while retaining v1.4 incomplete-interaction recognition, mirror-scoped repair, 101 thematic elements, 177 presentation formats, Menu QR v2.1, full-chain diagnostics, and all existing features.
